TrainableDef.label: maul
TrainableDef.description: Command the artificer to maul a target. This makes the artificer execute 3-12 melee attacks in quick succession.

TrainableDef.label: explosive jump
TrainableDef.description: Command the artificer to jump a sizeable distance. This makes the artificer release an explosion to propel itself to a different location on the map, leaving behind an explosion in size correlating to the distance traveled.

TrainableDef.label: concussion blast
TrainableDef.description: Command the artificer to release a concussive blast. This concussive blast is effectively a small and weak explosion, but effected pawns can end up stunned or potentially drop their weapons.

TrainableDef.label: craft explosives
TrainableDef.description: Command the artificer to create some explosives. These explosive grenades are the same type scavengers may sometimes be seen with, used to fuel scavenger grenade belts.

TrainableDef.label: summon rain
TrainableDef.description: Command the rivulet to summon rain. This, as you may expect, changes the weather to rain.

TrainableDef.label: slide
TrainableDef.description: Command the rivulet to slide. This propels the rivulet a very long distance very fast.
